title: calochortus oculatus
intro: Calochortus oculatus, also known as the golden star, is a type of flowering plant belonging to the lily family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for treating eye and skin issues due to its antibacterial and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Calochortus oculatus include soothing eye irritations, reducing inflammation, and promoting wound healing. Herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, decoctions, and topical applications, which are often used to treat various ailments in traditional medicine.
